title: The Broken Wing

actors: Lupe Velez, Leo Carrillo, Melvyn Douglas
plot: In a little Mexican village by the American border. However powerful big shot Captain Innocencio (a misnomer indeed!)is, he proves unable to charm Lolita, the shapely daughter of his neighbor, a big-time rancher. Lolita expects be...
